arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss’ Newcastle United loanee form admission after former QPR and Norwich man’s benched
arts.sum: John Mousinho admitted it’s taken time for Isaac Hayden’s Pompey career to get going.

arts.ttl: Top-ranking Blackburn Rovers officials to ignore request as Portsmouth and Sheffield United decision is made
arts.sum: Top-ranking officials of Blackburn Rovers will be at Fratton Park for their side’s important Championship fixture against Pompey on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Former Portsmouth boss caught in alleged Nazi salute storm as ex-Tottenham and West Ham manager brands Thomas Tuchel ‘German spy’
arts.sum: Former Pompey boss Harry Redknapp has found himself at the centre of controversy after appearing to perform a Nazi salute - and branding England boss Thomas Tuchel a ‘German spy’.

arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers' mission statement after 'washing machine' admission
arts.sum: Blackburn Rovers head coach Valerien Ismael has reflected on the task in hand with eight games to go

arts.ttl: Portsmouth v Blackburn: winless Valerien Ismael handed huge boost ahead of trip to Fratton Park
arts.sum: Blackburn Rovers have been handed a triple injury boost ahead of their Championship trip to Pompey.

arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers respond to supporters' board request with lengthy statement
arts.sum: Blackburn Rovers fans have urged key executives to stay away from matches until the end of the season

arts.ttl: Beck starts: Blackburn Rovers team news and predicted XI to face Portsmouth
arts.sum: The latest Blackburn Rovers team news as Valerien Ismael's side gear up to face Portsmouth in the Championship. The post Beck starts: Blackburn Rovers team news and predicted XI to face Portsmouth appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers handed triple fitness boost with more positive injury news
arts.sum: Blackburn Rovers have been given some positives news on the injury front

arts.ttl: Senior Blackburn Rovers officials under pressure not to attend games - including trips to Portsmouth and Sunderland
arts.sum: The directors’ box at Fratton Park could have a few noticeable gaps when Blackburn Rovers travel to the south coast to take on Pompey in the Championship.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth relegation rivals strengthen ranks with free-transfer move for former West Brom and Stoke City defender
arts.sum: One of Pompey’s main relegation rivals have once again delved into the free-agent market to strengthen their ranks ahead of a crucial Championship run-in.
